message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 40
skinparam BoxPadding 15

skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #b22222
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #fff7cc
  ActorBorderColor #b22222
  ActorBackgroundColor #fff7cc
  ArrowColor #000000
}

actor User
participant QuerySet
participant QueryParser
participant Tokenizer
participant Query
participant QueryComponent

User -> QuerySet : 1 QuerySet()
User -> QuerySet : 2 add("longitude", "*/CLON")
QuerySet -> QueryParser : 3 parse(queryString)
activate QueryParser
QueryParser -> Tokenizer : 4 tokenize(queryString)
Tokenizer --> QueryParser : 5 tokens

loop all sub-queries
  QueryParser -> Query : 6 Query()
  loop all components
    QueryParser -> QueryComponent : 7 QueryComponent()
    QueryParser -> Query : 8 push_back(component)
  end
end

QueryParser --> QuerySet : 9 queries
deactivate QueryParser
@enduml
```
